group_characteristics: What common patterns appear across S&P 500 sectors in relation to volatility during economic downturns?
How do characteristics of the MSCI World index affect behavior patterns of S&P 500 indices?
inter_group_dynamics: How do fluctuations in the United States 10-Year Bond Yield typically interact with the performance of the S&P 500 Financials?
What factors influence between-group relationships such as between S&P 500 Energy and Gold?
propagation_patterns: How do effects of high trading volumes in the NASDAQ Composite typically spread across other S&P 500 sectors?

causal_chains: What typical cause-effect sequences occur at the group level between CBOE Volatility Index and S&P 500 indices?
